acceptance_criteria: Keep the runtime fixture locally bootable without framework or cloud dependencies.
Preserve direct evidence for health, root response, metrics, and startup latency.
proposal.hypothesis: Tightening the fixture and smoke path keeps seeded repos observable before app-specific code replaces the template runtime.
proposal.summary: Keep the template's runtime fixture bootable with direct evidence.
proposal.title: Improve runtime boot reliability

summary: Keep the template locally bootable with observable startup evidence.
